sentences.sentence: Despite conference jeers, job cuts, and a financial crisis, health secretary Patricia Hewitt may find a reason to smile this week, as the NHS (British National Health Service) was named one of the top places to work by students.
sentences.translation: 尽管面临会议上的嘲讽、裁员和财政危机，卫生大臣帕特里夏·休伊特本周或许仍有理由微笑，因为学生把英国国家医疗服务体系（NHS）评为最佳工作单位之一。

structure.text: Despite conference jeers, job cuts, and a financial crisis
health secretary Patricia Hewitt
may find a reason to smile this week
as the NHS (British National Health Service) was named one of the top places to work by students

difficult_points: Despite 后列出三项不利背景，主句却说明她仍可能高兴，形成让步。
as 引导原因从句；was named... by students 是被动语态。

expressions.text: be named one of the top places to work
expressions.meaning_zh: 被评为最佳工作单位之一

sentences.sentence: Among engineering, science, and IT students, the health service was ranked second in this year's Univer-sum UK graduate survey of ideal employers, a leap of 54 places from last year.
sentences.translation: 在工程、科学和信息技术专业学生中，医疗服务体系在今年 Universum 英国毕业生理想雇主调查中排名第二，比去年跃升54位。

structure.text: Among engineering, science, and IT students
the health service
was ranked second in this year's Univer-sum UK graduate survey of ideal employers
a leap of 54 places from last year

difficult_points: a leap... 是同位补充，解释排名第二相较去年发生的变化。
源文把 Universum 异常断为 Univer-sum，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: The annual survey, conducted in the UK since 1997, canvassed the opinions of more than 7,700 final and penultimate-year students studying for degrees in business, engineering, science, IT, and the humanities, at 39 universities, between January and March this year.
sentences.translation: 这项自1997年起在英国开展的年度调查，于今年1月至3月期间征询了39所大学逾7700名毕业年级和倒数第二年级学生的意见，他们攻读商业、工程、科学、信息技术和人文学科学位。

structure.text: The annual survey
conducted in the UK since 1997
canvassed the opinions of more than 7,700 final and penultimate-year students
studying for degrees in business, engineering, science, IT, and the humanities
at 39 universities, between January and March this year

difficult_points: conducted... 修饰 survey，studying... 修饰 students，两个后置修饰对象不同。
final and penultimate-year 指毕业年级和倒数第二年级；canvass opinions 表示广泛征询意见。

sentences.sentence: Each student was presented with a list of 130 employers, nominated by students through a separate process, from which they selected the five they considered to be ideal employers.
sentences.translation: 每名学生都会看到一份包含130家雇主的名单，这些雇主由学生通过另一流程提名；学生再从中选出自己认为最理想的五家雇主。

structure.text: Each student
was presented with a list of 130 employers
nominated by students through a separate process
from which they selected the five
they considered to be ideal employers

difficult_points: nominated... 修饰 employers；from which 中 which 指整份名单。
the five 后省略 employers，后面的 they considered... 是省略关系词的定语从句。

expressions.text: be presented with a list of

sentences.sentence: The Universum list is based on the frequency of an organisation being selected as an ideal employer, following a weighting process.
sentences.translation: Universum 榜单依据各组织被选为理想雇主的频率，并经过加权处理后确定。

structure.text: The Universum list
is based on
the frequency of an organisation being selected as an ideal employer
following a weighting process

difficult_points: of 后是 organization + being selected 构成的动名词复合结构。
following... 说明榜单形成还经过加权步骤。

expressions.text: be based on the frequency of

sentences.sentence: This year, government departments and public sector organisations dominated the top spots, with the BBC ranked first among humanities, engineering, science, and IT students, retaining its place from last year, and coming third for those studying business.
sentences.translation: 今年，政府部门和公共机构占据榜单前列；BBC 在人文、工程、科学和信息技术专业学生中排名第一，保持了去年的位置，在商科学生中则位列第三。

structure.text: This year
government departments and public sector organisations
dominated the top spots
with the BBC ranked first among humanities, engineering, science, and IT students
retaining its place from last year
and coming third for those studying business

difficult_points: with + BBC + ranked 构成独立结构，补充榜首具体情况。
retaining 与 coming 并列，逻辑主语都是 BBC；those 指 students。

sentences.sentence: Among humanities students, the BBC was followed closely by the Foreign and Commonwealth Office and the Civil Service fast stream.
sentences.translation: 在人文学科学生中，紧随 BBC 之后的是外交和联邦事务部以及公务员快速晋升计划。

structure.text: Among humanities students
the BBC
was followed closely by
the Foreign and Commonwealth Office and the Civil Service fast stream

difficult_points: was followed by 用被动形式表达排名顺序，即后两者紧随 BBC。
fast stream 是英国公务员快速培养与晋升项目，并非水流。

sentences.sentence: The Cabinet Office and the Ministry of Defence were not far behind, ranked fifth and sixth respectively.
sentences.translation: 内阁办公室和国防部也紧随其后，分别排名第五和第六。

structure.text: The Cabinet Office and the Ministry of Defence
were not far behind
ranked fifth and sixth respectively

difficult_points: not far behind 是排名语境中的形象表达，表示名次接近。
ranked... 是过去分词补充说明；respectively 表示两机构与第五、第六一一对应。

sentences.sentence: As well as the NHS, engineering, science, and IT students favoured the Environment Agency, which leapt 83 places, from 86 in 2005 to number three this year.
sentences.translation: 除 NHS 外，工程、科学和信息技术专业学生还青睐环境署；该机构从2005年的第86位跃升83位，至今年第三位。

structure.text: As well as the NHS
engineering, science, and IT students
favoured the Environment Agency
which leapt 83 places
from 86 in 2005 to number three this year

difficult_points: As well as... 表示学生除 NHS 外还选择环境署。
which 回指 Environment Agency；from... to... 说明排名起点与终点。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, business students voted accountancy giants PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) as their favoured employer, followed by HSBC.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，商科学生把会计巨头普华永道（PwC）选为最青睐的雇主，其后是汇丰银行。

structure.text: Meanwhile
business students
voted accountancy giants PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) as their favoured employer
followed by HSBC

difficult_points: vote A as B 表示把 A 票选为 B；accountancy giants 是 PwC 的同位说明。
followed by HSBC 补充排名第二者，逻辑上修饰整个排名结果。

sentences.sentence: At a London awards ceremony sponsored by the Guardian, Foluke Ajayi, head of NHS careers at NHS employers, said its success this year reflected the reality of the health service, which is the third largest employer in the world and the largest in Europe.
sentences.translation: 在《卫报》赞助的伦敦颁奖典礼上，NHS 雇主组织职业事务主管福卢克·阿贾伊表示，NHS 今年的成功反映了医疗服务体系的真实规模：它是全球第三大、欧洲最大的雇主。

structure.text: At a London awards ceremony sponsored by the Guardian
Foluke Ajayi
head of NHS careers at NHS employers
said its success this year reflected the reality of the health service
which is the third largest employer in the world and the largest in Europe

difficult_points: sponsored... 修饰 ceremony；head... 是 Ajayi 的同位语。
said 后省略 that；its 指 NHS，which 则回指 the health service。

sentences.sentence: "We employ people in other clinical areas, such as health care.
sentences.translation: “我们也在其他临床领域雇用人员，例如医疗保健。

structure.text: We
employ
people in other clinical areas
such as health care

difficult_points: such as 引出 clinical areas 的例子。
本句引语未闭合，后续句子继续同一段直接引语，需保留开引号。

sentences.sentence: We employ IT managers, engineers, architects," she said, adding that the health service is no longer seen as a "second choice" career.
sentences.translation: 我们还雇用信息技术经理、工程师和建筑师。”她说，并补充称，医疗服务行业已不再被视为“第二选择”的职业。

structure.text: We employ IT managers, engineers, architects
she said
adding that the health service is no longer seen as a "second choice" career
that the health service is no longer seen as a "second choice" career

difficult_points: she said 是插入式报道语；adding... 的逻辑主语也是 she。
is no longer seen as 使用被动语态，second choice 引号表示过去的贬低性标签。

sentences.sentence: "People recognise that they can give something back to the community, but still develop a worthwhile career."
sentences.translation: “人们认识到，他们既能回馈社会，也仍然可以发展一份有价值的事业。”

structure.text: People
recognise
that they can give something back to the community
but still develop a worthwhile career

difficult_points: recognise 后的 that 宾语从句包含 can give 与 develop 两个并列谓语。
but 表示回馈社会与个人职业发展并不冲突。

expressions.text: give something back to the community

sentences.sentence: Sarah Churchman, director of student recruitment and diversity at PwC, said her company's success is down to a good campus presence, its commitment to invest in its employees and, with offices around the world, the chance to travel, something which just under half of the students polled said was an important factor when it came to looking for work.
sentences.translation: 普华永道学生招聘与多元化主管莎拉·丘奇曼表示，公司成功源于良好的校园影响力、对员工投入的承诺，以及凭借遍布全球的办公室所提供的出差机会；略少于半数受访学生称，出差机会是求职时的重要因素。

structure.text: Sarah Churchman
director of student recruitment and diversity at PwC
said her company's success is down to a good campus presence, its commitment to invest in its employees and, with offices around the world, the chance to travel
something
which just under half of the students polled said was an important factor when it came to looking for work

difficult_points: said 后省略 that；be down to 后并列三个成功原因。
something 同位概括 the chance to travel，which 从句修饰 something。
which 从句中又嵌入 students said，was 的主语是 which；when it came to... 表示谈到求职时。

sentences.sentence: One of the big four accountancy firms, PwC is not into gimmicks, and it does not offer freebies but, said Churchman, it does offer "a solid foundation" for anyone wanting a career in business.
sentences.translation: 作为四大会计师事务所之一，普华永道不热衷花招，也不提供赠品；但丘奇曼说，它确实能为希望从事商业职业的人提供“坚实基础”。

structure.text: One of the big four accountancy firms
PwC is not into gimmicks
and it does not offer freebies
but, said Churchman, it does offer "a solid foundation"
for anyone wanting a career in business

difficult_points: 句首名词短语同位说明 PwC 身份；be into 表示热衷。
said Churchman 是倒装插入语；does offer 中 does 强调确实提供。
wanting... 是现在分词修饰 anyone。

sentences.sentence: "We sell our people skills, so we are interested in building skills.
sentences.translation: “我们以员工技能为优势，因此我们重视技能培养。

structure.text: We sell our people skills
so we are interested in building skills

difficult_points: sell 在此不是字面出售，而是把员工能力作为公司的核心卖点。
so 引出结果；be interested in 后接动名词 building。

sentences.sentence: We're not selling something, we invest in our people," she added.
sentences.translation: 我们不是在卖某种产品，而是在投资于员工。”她补充道。

structure.text: We're not selling something
we invest in our people
she added

difficult_points: 逗号连接两个对照分句，语义上相当于 not... but...。
invest in our people 指投入资源培养员工；she added 是句末报道语。

sentences.sentence: Further down the rankings, but still with reason to celebrate, was John Lewis, which matched bumper sales this year with a leap from 111th place in 2005 to 26th among this year's humanities students.
sentences.translation: 排名较后但仍有理由庆祝的是约翰·刘易斯：该公司今年不仅销售额大增，在人文专业学生中的排名也从2005年的第111位跃升至第26位。

structure.text: Further down the rankings, but still with reason to celebrate
was
John Lewis
which matched bumper sales this year with a leap from 111th place in 2005 to 26th among this year's humanities students

difficult_points: 句首表语前置导致主谓倒装，真正主语是 John Lewis。
which 回指公司；match A with B 表示销售佳绩与排名跃升同时出现。

sentences.sentence: Sky found itself in 12th place, up from 104th last year, and the Environment Agency also proved popular among this student group, rising from 138th in 2005 to 7th this year.
sentences.translation: 天空电视台位列第12，较去年的第104位大幅上升；环境署在这类学生中也颇受欢迎，从2005年的第138位升至今年第7位。

structure.text: Sky found itself in 12th place
up from 104th last year
and the Environment Agency also proved popular among this student group
rising from 138th in 2005 to 7th this year

difficult_points: find itself in... 表示某组织处于某一排名，itself 回指 Sky。
rising... 的逻辑主语是 Environment Agency，补充其排名变化。

sentences.sentence: Among the business fraternity, shell saw a reversal of fortunes, rising to 30th place after last year's 76th position.
sentences.translation: 在商科学生群体中，壳牌的形势出现逆转，从去年的第76位升至第30位。

structure.text: Among the business fraternity
shell
saw a reversal of fortunes
rising to 30th place after last year's 76th position

difficult_points: business fraternity 指商科学生群体；源文 shell 小写已保留。
see a reversal of fortunes 表示处境逆转，rising... 具体说明向好变化。

sentences.sentence: There were a few dramatic drops in the rankings.
sentences.translation: 榜单中也有少数排名大幅下滑。

structure.text: There were
a few dramatic drops in the rankings

difficult_points: There were 是存在句，真正信息中心是 dramatic drops。
drops in the rankings 指名次下降，而不是评分数值降低。

sentences.sentence: The Bank of England fell from 14th in 2005 to 27th this year among humanities students, although it retained its mid-table position among those studying business.
sentences.translation: 在 人文专业学生中，英格兰银行从2005年的第14位跌至今年第27位，不过在商科学生中仍保持榜单中游位置。

structure.text: The Bank of England
fell from 14th in 2005 to 27th this year among humanities students
although it retained its mid-table position among those studying business

difficult_points: from... to... 表示名次变化；although 引出商科排名相对稳定的对比。
it 回指 Bank of England；those studying business 指商科学生。

sentences.sentence: British Airways also saw a slight dip, as did McKinsey & Co, which dropped from 11th to 22nd among business undergraduates.
sentences.translation: 英国航空的排名也略有下降，麦肯锡同样如此；后者在商科本科生中从第11位跌至第22位。

structure.text: British Airways
also saw a slight dip
as did McKinsey & Co
which dropped from 11th to 22nd among business undergraduates

difficult_points: as did McKinsey & Co 是比较倒装，did 代替 saw a slight dip。
which 回指 McKinsey & Co，并具体说明其名次降幅。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps more surprisingly, this year was the first appearance in the rankings of Teach First, a small charity launched three years ago that aims to create the "leaders of the future" by encouraging top graduates who would not normally consider a career in teaching to commit to work in "challenging" secondary schools for at least two years.
sentences.translation: 或许更令人意外的是，Teach First 今年首次登上榜单。这家三年前成立的小型慈善机构，旨在鼓励通常不会考虑从教的优秀毕业生承诺在“具有挑战性”的中学工作至少两年，从而培养“未来的领导者”。

structure.text: Perhaps more surprisingly
this year was the first appearance in the rankings of Teach First
a small charity
launched three years ago
that aims to create the "leaders of the future"
by encouraging top graduates who would not normally consider a career in teaching to commit to work in "challenging" secondary schools for at least two years

difficult_points: a small charity 同位解释 Teach First，launched... 和 that... 都修饰它。
by encouraging... 说明培养领导者的方式；who 修饰 graduates。
encourage + 宾语 + to commit to work 构成复合宾语，commit to 后的 work 是不带 to 的动词形式来自不定式结构。

expressions.text: the first appearance in the rankings

sentences.sentence: The organisation came straight in at number eight among humanities students and was voted 22nd by those studying engineering, science, and IT.
sentences.translation: 该组织一上榜便在人文专业学生中位列第八，并被工程、科学和信息技术专业学生排在第22位。

structure.text: The organisation
came straight in at number eight among humanities students
and was voted 22nd by those studying engineering, science, and IT

difficult_points: come straight in at 表示首次进入榜单便取得某名次。
those studying... 指相应专业的学生，studying 是现在分词修饰 those。

expressions.text: come straight in at number eight

sentences.sentence: James Darley, director of graduate recruitment at Teach First, said he was "bowled over" by the news.
sentences.translation: Teach First 毕业生招聘主管詹姆斯·达利表示，这一消息让他“惊喜不已”。

structure.text: James Darley
director of graduate recruitment at Teach First
said
he was "bowled over" by the news

difficult_points: director... 是 Darley 的同位语；said 后省略 that。
be bowled over 是习语，表示被消息震惊或深深打动，而非真的被撞倒。

sentences.sentence: "We were not expecting this.
sentences.translation: “我们没有料到会这样。

structure.text: We
were not expecting
this

difficult_points: this 指 Teach First 首次上榜且排名靠前的消息。
引语在本句末没有闭合，下一句继续说话内容。

sentences.sentence: We're a registered charity, only able to physically go to 15 universities."
sentences.translation: 我们是一家注册慈善机构，实际上只能亲自前往15所大学。”

structure.text: We're a registered charity
only able to physically go to 15 universities

difficult_points: only able... 是形容词短语补充说明 charity 的实际招聘覆盖能力。
physically go 强调机构资源有限，只能亲自到访15所大学。

expressions.text: be able to physically go to

sentences.sentence: The scheme, based on one run in the US, has the backing of more than 80 businesses,including Deloitte and HSBC.
sentences.translation: 该计划以美国的一项计划为蓝本，获得了80多家企业的支持，其中包括德勤和汇丰。

structure.text: The scheme
based on one run in the US
has the backing of more than 80 businesses
including Deloitte and HSBC

difficult_points: based on... 修饰 scheme；one 代替 scheme，run in the US 又修饰 one。
including 前原文缺少空格，sentence 中已保留。

sentences.sentence: During their two years, candidates undertake leadership training and emerge from the programme with a range of skills and experiences.
sentences.translation: 在这两年中，参与者接受领导力培训，并在完成项目时获得多种技能和经验。

structure.text: During their two years
candidates
undertake leadership training
and emerge from the programme with a range of skills and experiences

difficult_points: undertake 与 emerge 是共用主语 candidates 的并列谓语。
emerge from... with... 表示完成项目后带着所获能力与经验离开。

sentences.sentence: "We hope in the long term they will be our ambassadors, as we call them, in politics, industry, charities, who will have done it and continue to support the educationally disadvantaged," adds Darley.
sentences.translation: 达利补充说：“我们希望从长远看，他们能成为我们所谓的‘大使’，活跃在政界、产业界和慈善机构；他们既亲身参与过该计划，也会继续支持教育弱势群体。”

structure.text: We hope
in the long term they will be our ambassadors
as we call them
in politics, industry, charities
who will have done it and continue to support the educationally disadvantaged
adds Darley

difficult_points: hope 后省略 that；as we call them 是插入语，说明 ambassadors 是机构用语。
who 修饰 ambassadors，will have done 表示到未来某时已完成该计划，continue to support 与之并列。
it 指参加 Teach First 项目；the educationally disadvantaged 指教育机会不利群体。

sentences.sentence: This year, 260 graduates are expected to take up the Teach First challenge in schools in London and Manchester, More are expected over the coming years, as the scheme expands to Birmingham and three other cities by 2008.
sentences.translation: 今年预计将有260名毕业生在伦敦和曼彻斯特的学校接受 Teach First 挑战；随着该计划到2008年扩展至伯明翰及另外三座城市，未来几年预计会有更多人加入。

structure.text: This year, 260 graduates are expected to take up the Teach First challenge in schools in London and Manchester
More are expected over the coming years
as the scheme expands to Birmingham and three other cities by 2008

difficult_points: are expected to 是被动预测结构；take up a challenge 表示接受挑战。
Manchester 后原文以逗号连接大写 More，属于异常逗号拼接，已保留为同一句。
as 从句同时含时间和原因意味，说明人数增加伴随计划扩张。

sentences.sentence: Of the first set of recruits to complete the programme, half have gone on to work for "some amazing companies", while the other half have chosen to stay on in their schools for a further year - 20% in leadership roles.
sentences.translation: 在首批完成项目的参与者中，一半后来进入了“一些很棒的公司”工作，另一半则选择继续留校一年，其中20%担任领导职务。

structure.text: Of the first set of recruits to complete the programme
half have gone on to work for "some amazing companies"
while the other half have chosen to stay on in their schools for a further year
20% in leadership roles

difficult_points: to complete... 修饰 recruits；go on to do 表示完成一阶段后继续做另一件事。
while 对比两半参与者的去向；破折号后省略了 were，补充留校者职位情况。

sentences.sentence: While more than half of students were concerned about achieving a good work life balance, a third said they wanted a job that would challenge them.
sentences.translation: 超过一半的学生关心能否实现良好的工作与生活平衡，而三分之一的学生表示，他们希望工作能带来挑战。

structure.text: While more than half of students were concerned about achieving a good work life balance
a third
said
they wanted a job
that would challenge them

difficult_points: While 在此表示对比两类职业诉求，而非纯时间。
said 后省略 that；第二个 that 修饰 a job，并在从句中作主语。

expressions.text: achieve a good work life balance
expressions.meaning_zh: 实现良好的工作生活平衡

expressions.text: a job that would challenge them

sentences.sentence: Although male Students tended to focus more on the practical aspects of work, such as "building a sound financial base", women, particularly those studying for humanities degrees, had a more idealistic outlook, saying making a contribution to society was a key career goal.
sentences.translation: 尽管男学生往往更关注工作的实际层面，例如“打下稳固的经济基础”，但女性，尤其是攻读人文学科学位的女性，职业观更为理想主义；她们表示，为社会作贡献是重要职业目标。

structure.text: Although male Students tended to focus more on the practical aspects of work
such as "building a sound financial base"
women
particularly those studying for humanities degrees
had a more idealistic outlook
saying making a contribution to society was a key career goal

difficult_points: Although 从句与女性的 idealistic outlook 形成对比；源文 Students 大写已保留。
those 指 women，studying... 修饰 those。
saying 后省略 that；making a contribution to society 是宾语从句的主语。

expressions.text: focus on the practical aspects of

sentences.sentence: Almost half of all students said that paid over time was a key part of any company compensation package, However, business students said that the most important compensation, apart from salary, was performance-related bonuses, while important considerations for humanities students were retirement plans.
sentences.translation: 近一半学生表示，付费加班是任何公司薪酬方案的重要组成部分；然而，商科学生认为除工资外最重要的报酬是绩效奖金，而人文专业学生看重的则是退休计划。

structure.text: Almost half of all students said that paid over time was a key part of any company compensation package
However, business students said
that the most important compensation, apart from salary, was performance-related bonuses
while important considerations for humanities students were retirement plans

difficult_points: 源文写作 paid over time，语境应指 paid overtime，但必须保留原始断词形式。
package 后用逗号而非句号连接大写 However，是源文异常拼接。
while 对比商科与人文学生在附加报酬方面的不同重点。

sentences.sentence: Working overseas also scored highly among those surveyed this year, with 45% of business students, and 44% of humanities students, listing it as a priority.
sentences.translation: 海外工作在今年受访者中的重视程度也很高，45%的商科学生和44%的人文专业学生把它列为优先事项。

structure.text: Working overseas
also scored highly among those surveyed this year
with 45% of business students, and 44% of humanities students, listing it as a priority

difficult_points: Working overseas 是动名词短语作主语；those surveyed 是过去分词修饰 those。
with + 学生比例 + listing 构成独立结构，it 回指 Working overseas。

sentences.sentence: Ethical considerations and corporate social responsibilities were also mentioned, with a large percentage of humanities and engineering, science and IT students saying it was a key consideration when it came to choosing an employer.
sentences.translation: 受访者还提到了伦理考量和企业社会责任；很大比例的人文、工程、科学和信息技术专业学生表示，这是选择雇主时的一项关键考量。

structure.text: Ethical considerations and corporate social responsibilities
were also mentioned
with a large percentage of humanities and engineering, science and IT students saying
it was a key consideration
when it came to choosing an employer

difficult_points: with + students + saying 构成独立结构，补充调查对象的看法。
it 概括 ethical considerations and corporate social responsibilities 这一议题。
when it came to doing 表示谈到某项选择时，其中第一个 it 是固定结构用语。
